docs.title: Overview
docs.text: TitleScreen is the game startup/title screen UI. It extends Control and handles login/session connection, ship selection, resolution settings, and transition to the main game world. Integrates with FW_SceneRouter for scene transitions. Features server status probing, feed health monitoring via HTTP requests, player name management through PlayerIdentityManager, and access to settings, factions overview, discovery journal, and feed widgets.

docs.title: ToastNotification
docs.text: File: scripts/ui/toast_notification.gd (640 lines)

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
ToastNotification is a generic toast notification system with queue management. It supports two types of toasts — text toasts and discovery toasts — with animated slide-in/out, configurable duration, and click-to-dismiss. Discovery toasts auto-subscribe to DiscoveryManager signals for automatic display on entity/system discoveries.

Class name: ToastNotification Base class: Control Location: /home/j/3d-space/scripts/ui/toast_notification.gd (640 lines)

docs.title: Exported Tuning Parameters
docs.text:
• max_concurrent: int = 3 — Maximum simultaneously visible toasts
  • default_duration: float = 6.0 — Auto-dismiss duration in seconds
  • slide_duration: float = 0.3 — Animation duration for slide-in/out
  • max_queue_size: int = 10 — Maximum queued toasts when concurrent limit reached
  • enable_sound: bool = true — Play discovery sound effects
  • first_discovery_color: Color = Color(1.0, 0.84, 0.0) — Gold color for first discoveries
  • regular_discovery_color: Color = Color(0.5, 0.8, 1.0) — Blue color for regular discoveries

docs.title: Public API
docs.text:
• show_toast(title: String, body: String, duration: float = -1.0, accent_color: Color = Color(0.3, 0.85, 1.0)) — Display a text toast with title and body
  • show_discovery(discovery: DiscoveryData) — Display a discovery toast (auto-subscribes to DM signals)
  • clear_queue() — Clear all queued toasts
  • is_displaying() -> bool — Check if any toasts are active or queued

docs.title: Signals
docs.text:
• toast_shown(data: Variant) — Emitted when a new toast is displayed
  • toast_dismissed(data: Variant) — Emitted when a toast is dismissed (auto or manual)
  • queue_emptied — Emitted when the queue drains completely and no toasts remain

docs.title: Text Toasts
docs.text: Generic notifications with title, body text, optional duration override, and accent color. Used by FpsHudOverlay for surface readings (gravity, temperature, scanning), HudOverlay for transmission messages, and the Jobs module for job completions.

docs.title: Discovery Toasts
docs.text:
Specialized toasts for DiscoveryData events. Display: - Type-specific icon (procedurally generated via pixel drawing) - Title ("FIRST DISCOVERY: SYSTEM", "UNKNOWN SIGNAL DETECTED", etc.) - Display name in large font - Detail text with faction/territory/economy info

Discovery toasts are filtered — local system scan unlocks are suppressed, and only first discoveries or detected-level scans trigger display.

docs.title: Queue Management
docs.text: The system maintains two separate queues (_text_queue and _discovery_queue). When a new toast arrives: 1. If fewer than max_concurrent toasts are active, it displays immediately 2. Otherwise, it's queued (up to max_queue_size) 3. When a toast dismisses, the queue drains in priority order: discovery first, then text

docs.title: Icon Rendering
docs.text:
Icons are procedurally generated as 32x32 pixel images using raw Image manipulation — no sprite sheets or external assets needed: - SYSTEM: Circle - PLANET: Smaller circle (80% radius) - POI: Diamond shape - GATE / ASTEROID_BELT: Ring outline - ANOMALY: Star (cross + diamond overlay) - STATION: Square with cross

Each icon type has a distinct color, and station icons additionally use faction primary colors when available. Icons are cached by discovery type to avoid redundant rendering.

docs.title: Sound Integration
docs.text: Discovery sounds are routed through FwAudioService: - discovery_first — First discovery of any kind - discovery_system — System-level discovery (not first) - scan_detected — Unknown signal detected - discovery_generic — All other discoveries

docs.title: Animation
docs.text: Slide-in uses parallel tweens for opacity fade and vertical position, with cubic easing. Slide-out animates to the left (-40px offset) with 60% of slide duration. Click-to-dismiss triggers the same out animation.

docs.title: Relationships
docs.text:
• Consumed by FpsHudOverlay for surface reading notifications
  • Consumed by HudOverlay for transmission and transient status messages
  • Consumed by HudJobsModule for job completion toasts
  • Subscribes to DiscoveryManager signals (entity_discovered, system_discovered)
